loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage history and deviation stats; sag/swell event counts and expected range bounds are not measured or available for this asset.

loop1.title: Current Live Health
loop1.note: Showing live per-phase currents (R, Y, B, N) and average current. Current unbalance metric (current_unbalance_pct) is not logged for this asset; showing voltage unbalance as a proxy for electrical health.
